metadata.description: Daily rotating quotes for the Reflection Logging System landing page
metadata.instructions: Add your quotes as objects in the 'quotes' array below. Each quote will display once per rotation cycle.

quotes.text: Every entry matters. You're building clarity, one reflection at a time.
quotes.author: Your Reflection Practice

instructions.howToAdd: Copy the structure below and add more quotes to the 'quotes' array
instructions.rotation: Quotes rotate by day of year, so same quote appears all day but different quote each day

example.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
example.author: Steve Jobs

example.text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
example.author: Oscar Wilde

example.text: The mind is everything. What you think, you become.
example.author: Buddha
